ops.text:
VERIFY LANE for E26 (log 310454b). Protocol: independently recompute the headline numbers from RAW inputs (E26/inputs/dpo_{train,test}.parquet, byte-identical to _base-20260719/dataset/dpo — SHA256 confirmed) with my own code, not trusting summary.json/per_pair.csv.

Recompute plan:
1. Extract chosen/rejected assistant-message content directly from parquet (cell[0]["content"]).
2. Distances: d_char, d_word (own tokenization) via rapidfuzz normalized Levenshtein d=Lev(a,b)/max(|a|,|b|); d_qwen via Qwen/Qwen3-8B tokenizer (HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1). Cross-validate rapidfuzz against a hand-rolled DP Levenshtein on a spot-check sample so the metric itself is independently confirmed.
3. Aggregates recomputed from MY distances: small_edit_share (d<0.20), bootstrap 95% CI (10k, seed=26), quantiles, histogram, n_identical.
4. Compare to claimed: primary train_qwen small_edit_share=0.0447 (21/470), CI [0.0277,0.0638], median 0.789, mean 0.723, bakeoff_warranted=FALSE at pre-registered 0.30 threshold.
5. Check the pre-registered decision rule (>=0.30 -> bakeoff; threshold d<0.20) was applied as registered — no goalpost move.

SUCCESS CRITERION: verdict CONFIRMED iff my independent recomputation reproduces the primary small_edit_share point (21/470), CI, and the FALSE bakeoff decision; REFUTED with specifics on mismatch. $0 spend (pure compute).
